ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02086Olin Library Circulation Department records13-5-2086Compiled by A. LipskyDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
May 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:02:34 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Olin Library Circulation Department records
Cornell University. Libraries. John M. Olin Library. Circulation Department
13-5-2086
6 cubic feet. 6 cubic feet.
1947-1985. Reports, policies, records, meeting minutes, tally sheets, manuals, evaluations. Records and material pertaining to Olin Library and various other libraries on the Cornell University campus. Collection material in English 2077848
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
A. Lipsky
Date completed:
February 1983
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, May 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes material pertaining to FAUL (Five Associated University Libraries), CULSA (Cornell University Libraries Staff Association), the Committee on Economic Status of Librarians, South Central Research Library Council, the Olin Library Reference and Technical Services Departments; automation of library functions, particularly circulation; reclassification of library materials; memoranda and reports of the Academic Assembly; procedures and policies of the Acquisitions Department; records of various libraries on campus; and memoranda, minutes, shelving tally sheets, personnel manuals, job descriptions, evaluations, tour information, monthly reports, minutes of department staff meetings, 1974-1984; and other records of the Olin Library Circulation Department.
Cite As:
Olin Library Circulation Department records, #13-5-2086. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Reference services (Libraries) Libraries -- Circulation analysis. Libraries -- Automation. Classification -- Books. Acquisitions (Libraries) Cornell University Libraries Staff Association Cornell University. Libraries. John M. Olin Library. Acquisitions Department Cornell University. Libraries. John M. Olin Library. Reference Department Cornell University. Libraries. John M. Olin Library. Technical Services Cornell University. Academic Assembly Cornell University -- : Employees. Five Associated University Libraries South Central Research Library Council
